hero.tagline: 10+ years building web, mobile, and WordPress solutions with scalable architecture.

about.subtitle: Senior engineer shipping production systems across web, mobile, and enterprise.
about.title: About
about.p1: Nuwwar Saeed is a Senior Full Stack Developer and Software Engineer with 10+ years of experience building web applications, mobile apps, and enterprise backend systems.
about.p2: Primary languages — C#, PHP, and Dart — across ASP.NET Core, Laravel, and Flutter with BLoC and GetX state management. Experienced with REST API design, PostgreSQL, MySQL, WordPress/WooCommerce, third-party API integrations, authentication, scalable architecture, Docker, Git, and CI/CD pipelines.
about.p3: Senior-level delivery across production e-commerce platforms, bilingual agency websites, and government enterprise systems. Team lead background with Agile delivery and startup-ready execution.
about.education: Bachelor of Computer Engineering (Grade: 86% / Excellent), Aleppo University | 2007 – 2012

resume.subtitle: Experience, skills, and credentials
resume.title: Resume
resume.educationText: Bachelor of Computer Engineering (Grade: 86% / Excellent), Aleppo University | 2007 – 2012
resume.proj1: IndoOud (indooud.com) - Deployed an ASP.NET Core e-commerce engine handling sub-200ms catalog queries with fully integrated secure checkout.
resume.proj2: Social Spark (socialsparkcompany.com) - ASP.NET bilingual creative agency website with consultation booking and sector showcases
resume.proj3: Nobofa, Ehtiraf Print, WooCommerce stores - WordPress/PHP e-commerce with custom checkout and REST API integrations
resume.course2: AWS cloud computing — CDAC Institute, India
resume.course3: Advanced web technologies — CDAC Institute, India
resume.course7: C# & ASP.NET Core — REST APIs, authentication, integrations (self-study & projects)

bullets: Designed and deployed cross-platform mobile storefronts using Flutter, Dart, and BLoC, ensuring clean separation of concerns, reactive state management, and native-level performance across iOS and Android.
Collaborated within an Agile team to implement CI/CD cloud workflows, accelerating deployment cycles by 15%.
Integrated REST APIs and Firebase backend services, supporting real-time data sync for 3+ production mobile applications.
Designed responsive web and mobile interfaces for 5+ client products, improving user task completion rates by 20%.
Created wireframes and high-fidelity prototypes, reducing design-to-development handoff time by 30%.
Refined bilingual AR/EN user flows through iterative usability testing across 4 product releases.

experiences.role: Flutter Developer | Brother Creative, Saudi Arabia (2024)
bullets: Developed and published 2+ Flutter applications to Apple App Store and Google Play for commercial retail clients.
Architected feature modules with BLoC and GetX for predictable state flow and maintainable, team-scalable Flutter codebases.
Shipped production releases within 6-week Agile sprint cycles alongside cross-functional design teams.
Developed a scalable cross-platform e-commerce and logistics delivery application using Flutter and Dart, optimizing core user journeys across 500+ daily active sessions.
Architected enterprise state management by implementing BLoC for complex, predictable business logic and GetX for rapid, lightweight routing and state utilities.
Integrated MENA's premier BNPL payment systems, implementing the Tamara Flutter SDK and Tabi REST APIs to deliver secure, multi-installment checkout options.
Built a programmatic affiliate marketing tracking module, automating real-time commission calculations and custom promotional banner lifecycles.
Optimized app-to-backend data payloads for delivery tracking, ensuring reliable BLoC-driven state sync and under 200ms API query response times during peak sales periods.
Built a full WordPress/PHP website with gallery, services catalog, and contact workflows serving 1,000+ monthly visitors.
Customized themes and plugins to streamline print service quoting, reducing client inquiry response time by 40%.
Deployed SEO-optimized bilingual content pages, increasing organic search visibility by 35%.
Launched a WooCommerce store with cart, checkout, and product catalog supporting 200+ SKUs across health and wellness categories.
Integrated secure payment gateways and custom checkout flows, achieving a 12% increase in completed transactions.
Configured performance caching and image optimization, improving page load speed by 2.5 seconds on mobile.

experiences.role: Freelance Full Stack Developer | Independent Clients (2020 – 2022)
bullets: Delivered 8+ PHP Laravel backend projects with REST APIs and MySQL databases for small business and e-commerce clients.
Designed normalized database schemas and API endpoints handling 10,000+ records with sub-200ms query response times.
Managed end-to-end project delivery from requirements gathering through deployment for 3 concurrent client engagements.
Built a mobile commerce application with scalable UI architecture and REST API layer serving 1,500+ registered users.
Implemented BLoC and GetX state management with offline caching, reducing app crash rates by 18% across Android devices.
Used Jira under team lead direction to organize sprints, track tasks, and manage feature delivery across the development roadmap.
Collaborated on payment and inventory API integrations supporting real-time stock updates for 300+ products.

experiences.role: IT Team Lead & Senior Full Stack Developer | Government IT Sector (2012 – 2022)
bullets: Fast-tracked through 4 progressive roles from Graduate Trainee to Team Lead, initially selected due to graduating with an elite academic score (86% grade in Computer Engineering).
Promoted to IT Team Planner & Leader, managing end-to-end project lifecycles, sprint architectures, and delivering highly scalable enterprise workflows.
Architected 10+ full-stack web solutions using C# and PHP Laravel, reducing manual processing times by 40% across state-level departments.
Designed and optimized high-concurrency relational databases, leveraging Oracle Database, PL/SQL, and MySQL to handle massive state-level datasets.
Engineered secure REST APIs and third-party integrations using Java and Oracle ADF, optimizing back-end authentication and system communication.
Acted as Lead Instructor and Mentor, training junior IT team elements on software engineering best practices, advanced clean-code architectures, and Git version control.

resume.cvSkill1: Backend: C#, ASP.NET Core, ASP.NET Web API, REST API, Laravel, PHP
resume.cvSkill2: Databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle Database, PL/SQL, SQL query optimization
resume.cvSkill3: Frontend: JavaScript, TypeScript, Next.js, React, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS
resume.cvSkill4: Mobile: Flutter, Dart, BLoC Architecture, GetX, Firebase, REST API, App Store Deployment
resume.cvSkill5: CMS and E-commerce: WordPress, WooCommerce, custom themes, plugins, payment integration
resume.cvSkill6: DevOps and Tools: Git, GitHub, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, AWS cloud basics
resume.cvSkill7: Integrations: Tabi API, Tamara SDK, BNPL Gateways, Affiliate Marketing Modules, Third-party APIs
resume.cvSkill8: Enterprise: Oracle ADF, Java, scalable architecture, government systems
resume.cvSkill9: Methods: Agile, Scrum, team leadership, problem solving, independent delivery
resume.cvSkill10: Security: Backend security awareness, secure authentication patterns
resume.cvSkill11: Cloud: AWS fundamentals, Firebase, cloud-hosted deployments
resume.cvSkill12: Design: UI/UX fundamentals, responsive and bilingual interfaces

projects.subtitle: Selected builds across e-commerce, agencies, and custom platforms.
projects.title: Selected work

socialSpark.title: Social Spark
socialSpark.description: Creative agency website (Arabic/English) built with ASP.NET — premium landing page, sector showcases, consultation booking, and bilingual UX. Live at socialsparkcompany.com.

indoOud.title: IndoOud — Gaharu Aroma
indoOud.description: Luxury oud & agarwood e-commerce (Arabic/English) built with ASP.NET and PostgreSQL — categories for bakhoor, natural oud oils, gifts & accessories, product variations, cart, wishlist, and SAR pricing. Premium dark-store UX for Indonesian gaharu perfumes.

nobofa.title: NOBOFA Store
nobofa.description: Full website for NOBOFA — healthier services provider. Features kitchen (healthy food & drinks), salon & beauty, massage, diet shop, product showroom, and e‑commerce with cart and checkout.

ehtiraf.title: Ehtiraf Print
ehtiraf.description: Full website for مطبعة احتراف (Ehtiraf Print) — print shop with services, pricing, client reviews, contact, and blog. Showcases packaging, boxes, bags, labels, stickers, cards, and branding services.

lamssa.title: Lamssa Beauty Wholesale
lamssa.description: Landing and catalog experience for Lamssa beauty and makeup products, with WooCommerce and WhatsApp ordering flows.

doctorAssessment.title: Doctor Website + Assessment
doctorAssessment.description: Doctor website with an interactive assessment tool to help visitors understand their condition context and next steps.

customTheme.title: Custom WordPress theme
customTheme.description: Responsive theme with custom blocks, options panel, and optimized performance.

wooStore.title: WooCommerce store
wooStore.description: E‑commerce site with custom checkout, product filters, and payment integration.

northafrica.title: North Africa
northafrica.description: WooCommerce store and blog for building materials and bathroom accessories. (Host expired — no live link.)

rentCarsHouses.title: Rent Cars & Houses
rentCarsHouses.description: Rental platform for cars and houses with WooCommerce. Browse catalog, view detailed specifications and parameters for each vehicle and property, with search and booking options.

pluginDev.title: Plugin development
pluginDev.description: Custom plugin for content workflow, shortcodes, and admin tools.
